baseline_results.question: Supplier delivery metrics for nation 1 and mode RAIL
baseline_results.sql: SELECT s.S_NATIONKEY, l.L_SHIPMODE, COUNT(*) AS line_count, SUM(l.L_EXTENDEDPRICE) AS gross_value, SUM(CASE WHEN l.L_RECEIPTDATE <= l.L_COMMITDATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_lines FROM SUPPLIER s JOIN LINEITEM l ON s.S_SUPPKEY = l.L_SUPPKEY WHERE s.S_NATIONKEY = 1 AND l.L_SHIPMODE = 'RAIL' GROUP BY s.S_NATIONKEY, l.L_SHIPMODE

baseline_results.question: Part demand and supplier diversity size>=7, suppliers>=3

baseline_results.sql: SELECT s.S_NATIONKEY, l.L_SHIPMODE, COUNT(*) AS line_count, SUM(l.L_EXTENDEDPRICE) AS gross_value, SUM(CASE WHEN l.L_RECEIPTDATE <= l.L_COMMITDATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_lines FROM SUPPLIER s JOIN LINEITEM l ON s.S_SUPPKEY = l.L_SUPPKEY WHERE s.S_NATIONKEY = 14 AND l.L_SHIPMODE = 'SHIP' GROUP BY s.S_NATIONKEY, l.L_SHIPMODE

baseline_results.question: Part demand and supplier diversity size>=25, suppliers>=1
baseline_results.sql: WITH part_activity AS ( SELECT l.L_PARTKEY AS partkey, COUNT(*) AS line_count, SUM(l.L_QUANTITY) AS total_qty FROM LINEITEM l GROUP BY l.L_PARTKEY), supplier_diversity AS ( SELECT ps.PS_PARTKEY AS partkey, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) AS supplier_count FROM PARTSUPP ps GROUP BY ps.PS_PARTKEY) SELECT p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE, pa.line_count, pa.total_qty, sd.supplier_count FROM PART p JOIN part_activity pa ON p.P_PARTKEY = pa.partkey JOIN supplier_diversity sd ON p.P_PARTKEY = sd.partkey WHERE p.P_SIZE >= 25 AND sd.supplier_count >= 1 ORDER BY pa.total_qty DESC FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Supplier delivery metrics for nation 1 and mode RAIL
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT L.L_SUPPKEY, COUNT(*) AS delivery_count, SUM(L.L_QUANTITY) AS total_quantity
FROM LINEITEM L
JOIN SUPPLIER S ON L.L_SUPPKEY = S.S_SUPPKEY
WHERE S.S_NATIONKEY = 1 AND L.L_SHIPMODE = 'RAIL'
GROUP BY L.L_SUPPKEY
ORDER BY delivery_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Part demand and supplier diversity size>=7, suppliers>=3
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE, COUNT(l.L_LINENUMBER) AS line_count, SUM(l.L_QUANTITY) AS total_qty, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) AS supplier_count
FROM LINEITEM l
JOIN PARTSUPP ps ON l.L_PARTKEY = ps.PS_PARTKEY
JOIN PART p ON l.L_PARTKEY = p.P_PARTKEY
WHERE p.P_SIZE >= 7
GROUP BY p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) >= 3
FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Revenue and order profile for nation 3 in 1995
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT C.C_NATIONKEY, COUNT(O.O_ORDERKEY) AS order_count, SUM(O.O_TOTALPRICE) AS net_revenue
FROM CUSTOMER C
JOIN ORDERS O ON C.C_CUSTKEY = O.O_CUSTKEY
WHERE C.C_NATIONKEY = 3 AND O.O_ORDERDATE >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND O.O_ORDERDATE < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY C.C_NATIONKEY

mcp_results.question: Supplier delivery metrics for nation 4 and mode MAIL
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT L.L_SUPPKEY, COUNT(*) AS delivery_count, SUM(L.L_QUANTITY) AS total_quantity
FROM LINEITEM L
JOIN SUPPLIER S ON L.L_SUPPKEY = S.S_SUPPKEY
JOIN NATION N ON S.S_NATIONKEY = N.N_NATIONKEY
WHERE N.N_NATIONKEY = 4 AND L.L_SHIPMODE = 'MAIL'
GROUP BY L.L_SUPPKEY
FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

FROM LINEITEM l

FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

SELECT L.L_SUPPKEY, COUNT(*) AS delivery_count, SUM(L.L_QUANTITY) AS total_quantity
FROM LINEITEM L
JOIN SUPPLIER S ON L.L_SUPPKEY = S.S_SUPPKEY
JOIN NATION N ON S.S_NATIONKEY = N.N_NATIONKEY
WHERE N.N_NATIONKEY = 7 AND L.L_SHIPMODE = 'TRUCK'
GROUP BY L.L_SUPPKEY
ORDER BY delivery_count DESC

mcp_results.question: Part demand and supplier diversity size>=13, suppliers>=4
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE, COUNT(l.L_LINENUMBER) AS line_count, SUM(l.L_QUANTITY) AS total_qty, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) AS supplier_count
FROM LINEITEM l
JOIN PARTSUPP ps ON l.L_PARTKEY = ps.PS_PARTKEY
JOIN PART p ON l.L_PARTKEY = p.P_PARTKEY
WHERE p.P_SIZE >= 13
GROUP BY p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) >= 4
FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Revenue and order profile for nation 9 in 1997
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT C.C_NATIONKEY, COUNT(O.O_ORDERKEY) AS order_count, SUM(O.O_TOTALPRICE) AS net_revenue
FROM CUSTOMER C
JOIN ORDERS O ON C.C_CUSTKEY = O.O_CUSTKEY
WHERE C.C_NATIONKEY = 9 AND O.O_ORDERDATE >= DATE '1997-01-01' AND O.O_ORDERDATE < DATE '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY C.C_NATIONKEY

SELECT p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE, COUNT(l.L_LINENUMBER) AS line_count, SUM(l.L_QUANTITY) AS total_qty, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) AS supplier_count
FROM LINEITEM l
JOIN PARTSUPP ps ON l.L_PARTKEY = ps.PS_PARTKEY
JOIN PART p ON l.L_PARTKEY = p.P_PARTKEY
WHERE p.P_SIZE >= 28
GROUP BY p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) >= 4
FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Revenue and order profile for nation 4 in 1993
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT C.C_NATIONKEY, COUNT(O.O_ORDERKEY) AS order_count, SUM(O.O_TOTALPRICE) AS net_revenue
FROM CUSTOMER C
JOIN ORDERS O ON C.C_CUSTKEY = O.O_CUSTKEY
WHERE C.C_NATIONKEY = 4 AND O.O_ORDERDATE >= DATE '1993-01-01' AND O.O_ORDERDATE < DATE '1994-01-01'
GROUP BY C.C_NATIONKEY

mcp_results.question: Supplier delivery metrics for nation 5 and mode SHIP
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT S.S_SUPPKEY, S.S_NAME, COUNT(L.L_ORDERKEY) AS delivery_count, SUM(L.L_QUANTITY) AS total_quantity
FROM SUPPLIER S
JOIN LINEITEM L ON S.S_SUPPKEY = L.L_SUPPKEY
JOIN NATION N ON S.S_NATIONKEY = N.N_NATIONKEY
WHERE N.N_NATIONKEY = 5 AND L.L_SHIPMODE = 'SHIP'
GROUP BY S.S_SUPPKEY, S.S_NAME
FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

SELECT L.L_SUPPKEY, COUNT(*) AS delivery_count, SUM(L.L_QUANTITY) AS total_quantity
FROM LINEITEM L
JOIN SUPPLIER S ON L.L_SUPPKEY = S.S_SUPPKEY
JOIN NATION N ON S.S_NATIONKEY = N.N_NATIONKEY
WHERE N.N_NATIONKEY = 20 AND L.L_SHIPMODE = 'RAIL'
GROUP BY L.L_SUPPKEY
ORDER BY delivery_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Part demand and supplier diversity size>=31, suppliers>=2
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE, COUNT(l.L_LINENUMBER) AS line_count, SUM(l.L_QUANTITY) AS total_qty, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) AS supplier_count
FROM LINEITEM l
JOIN PARTSUPP ps ON l.L_PARTKEY = ps.PS_PARTKEY
JOIN PART p ON l.L_PARTKEY = p.P_PARTKEY
WHERE p.P_SIZE >= 31
GROUP BY p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) >= 2
FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Revenue and order profile for nation 22 in 1995
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT C.C_NATIONKEY, COUNT(O.O_ORDERKEY) AS order_count, SUM(O.O_TOTALPRICE) AS net_revenue
FROM CUSTOMER C
JOIN ORDERS O ON C.C_CUSTKEY = O.O_CUSTKEY
WHERE C.C_NATIONKEY = 22 AND O.O_ORDERDATE >= DATE '1995-01-01' AND O.O_ORDERDATE < DATE '1996-01-01'
GROUP BY C.C_NATIONKEY

mcp_results.question: Supplier delivery metrics for nation 23 and mode MAIL
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT L.L_SUPPKEY, COUNT(*) AS delivery_count, SUM(L.L_QUANTITY) AS total_quantity
FROM LINEITEM L
JOIN SUPPLIER S ON L.L_SUPPKEY = S.S_SUPPKEY
JOIN NATION N ON S.S_NATIONKEY = N.N_NATIONKEY
WHERE N.N_NATIONKEY = 23 AND L.L_SHIPMODE = 'MAIL'
GROUP BY L.L_SUPPKEY
FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Part demand and supplier diversity size>=34, suppliers>=5
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE, COUNT(l.L_LINENUMBER) AS line_count, SUM(l.L_QUANTITY) AS total_qty, COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) AS supplier_count
FROM LINEITEM l
JOIN PARTSUPP ps ON l.L_PARTKEY = ps.PS_PARTKEY
JOIN PART p ON l.L_PARTKEY = p.P_PARTKEY
WHERE p.P_SIZE >= 34
GROUP BY p.P_PARTKEY, p.P_SIZE
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ps.PS_SUPPKEY) >= 5
FETCH FIRST 50 ROWS ONLY

mcp_results.question: Revenue and order profile for nation 0 in 1998
mcp_results.mcp_sql:
SELECT C.C_NATIONKEY, COUNT(O.O_ORDERKEY) AS order_count, SUM(O.O_TOTALPRICE) AS net_revenue
FROM CUSTOMER C
JOIN ORDERS O ON C.C_CUSTKEY = O.O_CUSTKEY
WHERE C.C_NATIONKEY = 0 AND O.O_ORDERDATE >= DATE '1998-01-01' AND O.O_ORDERDATE < DATE '1999-01-01'
GROUP BY C.C_NATIONKEY
